nodes.name: Mountain pipit
nodes.summary: Mountain pipit（Anthus hoeschi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mountain pipit。

nodes.name: Mountain pipit
nodes.summary: The mountain pipit (Anthus hoeschi) is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae. Its breeding range is in Lesotho and adjacent South Africa. Its non-breeding range possibly includes Botswana, the DRC, Namibia and Zambia. Its natural overwintering habitat is subtropical or tropical grassland, and it breeds in temperate high altitude grassland in summer. References External links Mountain pipit - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
